title: Stop Wasting Material.
subtitle: Cabinetos automates your parts list, cut list, board optimisation and printing — so you can focus on building, not calculating.
mockupPlaceholder: App screenshot / demo video goes here
featuresSectionSubtitle: Four steps from design to workshop-ready cut sheets.

features.title: Parts List
features.description: Automatically generate complete parts lists from your cabinet designs. No more manual counting.

features.title: Cut List
features.description: Optimised cut lists that tell you exactly what to cut, in what order, from which board.

features.title: Board Optimisation
features.description: Intelligent nesting algorithms that minimise waste and save you up to 15% on materials.

features.title: Print Ready
features.description: Export professional cut sheets and labels ready for the workshop floor.

faq.question: Who is Cabinetos for?
faq.answer: Cabinet makers, carpenters, kitchen fitters, and anyone who builds furniture from sheet materials.

faq.question: Does it work with any board size?
faq.answer: Yes — you can set custom board dimensions, thickness, and even grain direction preferences.

faq.question: Can I save and reuse projects?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Save templates for common cabinet types and reuse them across projects.

faq.question: What makes it different from other cut list tools?
faq.answer: Cabinetos is built by a working carpenter who understands the real workshop workflow — it's practical, not theoretical.

bottomCtaSubtitle: Join carpenters who are saving time and materials with Cabinetos.
